title: Metasploit Basic Workflow
when_to_use: When using Metasploit for authorised exploitation

steps.title: Initial Setup/Scanning
steps.instruction: Start Metasploit Framework console with msfconsole
steps.tip: Start with the most reliable information source for metasploit basic workflow
steps.expected_output: Metasploit console ready with available modules and database connected

steps.title: Data Collection/Configuration
steps.instruction: Search for appropriate exploit modules matching target service and version
steps.tip: Organize data systematically to avoid duplicates and ensure coverage
steps.expected_output: List of applicable exploit modules with descriptions and options

steps.title: Analysis/Enumeration
steps.instruction: Load selected exploit module using 'use' command
steps.tip: Look for patterns and correlations in collected data
steps.expected_output: Exploit module loaded and ready for configuration

steps.title: Advanced Technique/Filtering
steps.instruction: Review all configurable options with 'show options' command
steps.tip: Use multiple techniques to increase coverage and accuracy
steps.expected_output: Complete list of required and optional parameters for the exploit

steps.title: Correlation/Testing
steps.instruction: Set RHOSTS variable to target IP address or CIDR range
steps.tip: Validate findings across different tools and methods
steps.expected_output: Target hosts configured and ready for exploitation

steps.title: Validation/Exploitation
steps.instruction: Select appropriate payload matching target architecture (Meterpreter, reverse shell)
steps.expected_output: Payload selected matching target operating system and architecture

steps.title: Documentation/Reporting
steps.instruction: Configure LHOST and LHOST with attacker IP and listening port for reverse connection
steps.tip: Review all findings before compilation for accuracy and completeness
steps.expected_output: Listener configured and exploit parameters ready

steps.title: Step 8
steps.instruction: Execute exploit and establish session with target system
steps.tip: Follow standard best practices for step 8
steps.expected_output: Active Meterpreter or shell session on compromised target system
